return(function(z,i,G,J,A,D,f,l,t,j,y,n,w,o,m,r,U,c,k,P,g,X,S)y,U,n,o,m,S,t,l,c,X,j,g,P,r,k,w=function(z,F)local i=r(F)local G=function(G,J,A,D,f,w)return g(z,{G;J,A;D;f;w},F,i)end return G J({},{[F(429472-494266)]=l;[F(651654+-716263)]=z;[F(-272398+207598)]=function()return 1751055-919563 end})end end,function(z)S[z]=S[z]-(-982543-(-982544))if 124256+-124256==S[z]then S[z],w[z]=nil,nil
